name: TG Sleepover (best bro to girlfriend, straight version)
description:
You (19 M) show up to your bestie's (19 M) place for a sleepover.

He shows you an old dusty book, causing a magical incident after which you are changed into a young woman (19 F).

It appears soon that to anybody outside the room, you always were this girl. More than that, your bestie's family definitely believes you and him are dating (they are chill with it and are actually rooting for you two).

Will you struggle to recover your lost identity? Or will you accommodate to your new role, eventually forgetting that everything used to be different?

Note: this is a (M2F-Pov)-loves-(M-Char) scenario. There are currently 2 other public versions of this bot:

  • A (M2F-PoV)-loves-(F-Char) version, the "Yuri" version. For an accidental reason, instead of Pete, his older sister Laura (who you crush on) was in the room instead of him when it happened (so that to everybody else, you and Laura are an established lesbian couple).

  • A (M-Pov)-loves-(M2F-Char) version. Pete gets transformed instead of {{user}}. He becomes Penelope, Laura's little sister and {{user}}'s girlfriend.

If you are interested, other versions with other gender or PoV combinations could be considered.
creator: AnitaOhms
